title: Fix Active Accounts Page — Show Submitted Bank Accounts with Status Indicators

requirements.text: Fix the Active Accounts page so it no longer shows 'Failed to Load Account' or 'Unauthorized: Only users can view bank details' errors. The page must load and display bank accounts without requiring any login or authentication.

quotes: Failed to Load Account error — wo hata ke ek proper Active Accounts page banaya ja sakta hai

acceptanceCriteria: Active Accounts page loads without any error message
No authentication or login is required to view the accounts page
Backend does not return unauthorized error when fetching bank accounts

requirements.text: Display each submitted bank account as a card on the Active Accounts page showing: Bank Name, Account Type, and Account Number with only the last 4 digits visible (rest masked).

quotes: Har account mein Bank Name, Account Type, Account Number (last 4 digits)

acceptanceCriteria: Each bank account is shown as a card with Bank Name, Account Type, and masked Account Number
Account number shows only last 4 digits (e.g., ****1234)
All submitted accounts are listed on the page

requirements.text: Show a colored status dot on each bank account card indicating its current status: Yellow dot for Pending/Verification (default for newly submitted accounts), Green dot for Live Active, and Red dot for Error/Rejected.

quotes: Status dots ke saath: Yellow = Pending/Verification (default), Green = Live Active, Red = Error/Rejected

acceptanceCriteria: Each account card displays a colored status dot
Newly submitted accounts show a yellow (Pending) dot by default
Accounts with 'active' status show a green dot
Accounts with 'rejected' or 'error' status show a red dot
Status dot is clearly visible on the card

requirements.text: When a user submits bank details from the Home page or Deposit page (via BankDetailsForm), the newly submitted account must immediately appear in the Active Accounts page with a Pending (yellow) status.

quotes: Jab Home ya Deposit page se bank details submit hon, wo turant Accounts section mein Pending status ke saath dikhe
yaha se log account detail submit krege yaad rakh na

acceptanceCriteria: After submitting bank details from any page, navigating to the Accounts tab shows the new account
Newly submitted account appears with Pending (yellow) status
No page refresh required — account appears immediately after submission

requirements.text: If no bank accounts have been submitted yet, the Active Accounts page should show a friendly empty state message (e.g., 'No accounts added yet. Submit your bank details to get started.') instead of an error or blank screen.
acceptanceCriteria: Empty state message is shown when no accounts exist
Empty state does not show any error message
Empty state includes a prompt or hint to add bank details

constraints: Do not require login or Internet Identity authentication to view the Active Accounts page
Account numbers must be masked — show only last 4 digits
Newly submitted accounts must default to Pending (yellow) status
nonGoals: Admin ability to change account status (already exists in ProfilePage)
Adding new bank account form directly on the Accounts page
Real-time backend push notifications for status changes
